item.title: Eternal Committee Mulls Lone Transmutation's Wake Five Years On
item.description: Kly-4-Tharn's 47,000-Hertz Laments Force 17-Volume Ledger into Extended Recess.

item.title: 4.7 Million Heat-Spikes Celebrated as Neuro-Debt in Xq'thal-Vren Heat-Corp's Grand Lunar Relay Success
item.description: Meanwhile, missing sand sculptures are touted as innovative absence-projections, fueling an economic boom of zero-dimensional profits.

item.title: Xq'thal-Vren Raw-Underground Spurs Rated as Post-Collapse Amenities in Sealed Lightning Warrens
item.description: Luxury products now feature in nostalgia thresholds as citizens trade heat-tokens for damp memories.

item.title: Napoleon’s Crooked-Plate Bistros Unveils ‘Hormuz Specials’ Amidst Relentless Supply Violations
item.description: Location managers assure customers they will never, ever stop launching culinary chaos through the mall's non-Euclidean corridors.

item.title: Vem Postal Authority Unveils Lacquer Renewal Pledge: A Glistening Solution for K't Fold's Hauler Hiccups
item.description: Officials tout a lacquered fix for the K't Fold route after its 92 percent hauler loss.

item.title: Oueiaaia Voting Trust Ponders Its Own Existential Dilemma
item.description: What is the meaning of a committee that voted 47,000 to 3 to adjourn until the next millennium?

item.title: Lord Semperance Demands Guilds Cease Flash-Detonations or Face Permit Doom
item.description: Ancient grudge rekindled as timber markets rest on the whims of glowing scrolls.

item.title: EarthCorp Names Klyra V. Drunescu Vice Director of Narrative Compliance: Internal Audit Goes Corp-Color
item.description: Ocular Redaction Implant Ensures All Facts Are 'On-Brand'—Eclipsing Previous 'Truths' With Shiny New 'Fiction'

item.title: Moonburg Billionaires Slam Towel Service: 'Where's Our Bioluminescent Spa Experience?'
item.description: New Vem personality endorses luxury towel concierge while spore-credits climb.

item.title: Xq'thal-Vren Heat-Corp Claims Moon Broadcast Ignites 4.7 Million Heat-Spike Views Despite Void Audience
item.description: Corporate execs tout record thermal-ROI while remaining oblivious to their vast audience of non-existent sand sculptures.
